name: Lunar Oscillator
text: Skip the next Monster Phase. Take 1 item from the discard pile and give it to any other player.

name: Pulse Pummel
text: Move any Monster up to 4 spaces.

name: Neuro Stabilizer
text: The current player takes 2 additional actions.

name: Location Inverter
text: Place a Hero in a Monster's location, and place that Monster in the Hero's old location.

name: Ethereal Goggles
text: Choose one: Reveal a facedown Lair OR Move any Monster up to 3 spaces.

name: Chronohelm
text: Choose one: Move each Monster up to 2 spaces OR Move each Hero up to 2 spaces.

name: Clockwork Companion
text: Take all items from any one space and give them to any one player.

name: Pneumatic Jetpack
text: Place a hero in any space.

name: Ironclad Buggy
text: Choose a space with a Hero. You may place any number of Heroes in that space.

name: Spectral Diverter
text: Each player draws and places 1 item from the item bag.
